zh.lifeSummary: 當Raoul Ralph de Tosny III於1080年出生在法國諾門迪康查斯時，他的父親Raoul III de Tosny seigneur de Conches-en-Ouche53歲，母親Isabel de Monfort24歲。他和Adelise of Huntingdon至少有4個兒子和4個女兒。他去世於1126年在法國i萊-德-福朗斯瑟-吉馬內康查斯享年46歲，埋葬在法國諾門迪艾康查--。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Tosny
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Jean Pierre.
Americanized form of any of various surnames ultimately derived from the Latin personal name Antonius (see Anthony ), for example Greek Antoniou and Italian Toni .
French: from the personal name Tony, a pet form of Antonin (from Latin Antoninus, a derivative of Antonius; see Anthony ).

variants.name: Anthony
meanings: English and West Indian (mainly Antigua and Barbuda, Saint Lucia, and Trinidad and Tobago, also Dutch Caribbean): from the personal name Anthony, Latin Antonius, which, with its variants and cognates, is one of the commonest personal names in Europe. Spellings with -h-, which first appear in English in the 16th century and in French (as Anthoine) at about the same time, are due to the erroneous belief that the name derives from Greek anthos ‘flower’. The popularity of the personal name in Christendom is largely due to the cult of the Egyptian hermit Saint Anthony ( AD 251–356), who in his old age gathered a community of hermits around him, and for that reason is regarded by some as the founder of monasticism. It was further increased by the fame of Saint Anthony of Padua (1195–1231), who long enjoyed a great popular cult and who is believed to help people find lost things. In North America, the English form of the surname has absorbed cognates and derivatives (patronymics) from other languages, for example Greek patronymic Antoniades , Italian Antoni , Polish Antoniewicz , Croatian and Serbian Antonović (see Antonovich ) and Antunović; see also below. The name Anthony is also found among Christians in southern India, but since South Indians traditionally do not have hereditary surnames, the southern Indian name was in most cases registered as such only after immigration of its bearers to the US. Compare Antony .

German, Flemish, and French (mainly Alsace): Latinized (humanistic) patronymic from local equivalents of the Latin personal name Antonius, from its genitive form Antoni(i). In North America, this surname is also an altered form of the German, Dutch, French, and Slovak cognates Antoni 1 and Antony 2.
History: John Anthony of Hampstead, Middlesex, England (now part of north London) migrated to Boston, MA, in 1634. By 1640 he had moved to Providence, RI, where his descendants are still established.

nameMeanings.name: Raoul
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: Ralph
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

variants.name: Ralf
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

en.lifeSummary: When Raoul Ralph de Tosny III was born in 1080, in Conches, Normandy, France, his father, Raoul III de Tosny seigneur de Conches-en-Ouche, was 53 and his mother, Isabel de Monfort, was 24. He had at least 4 sons and 4 daughters with Adelise of Huntingdon. He died in 1126, in Conches, Seine-et-Marne, Île-de-France, France, at the age of 46, and was buried in Conches-en-Ouche, Eure, Normandy, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Raoul Ralph de Tosny III est né en 1080, à Conches, Normandie, France, son père, Raoul III de Tosny seigneur de Conches-en-Ouche, avait 53 ans et sa mère, Isabel de Monfort, avait 24 ans. Il a eu au moins 4 fils et 4 filles avec Adelise of Huntingdon. Il est décédé en 1126, à Conches, Seine-et-Marne, Île-de-France, France, à l’âge de 46 ans, et a été enterré à Conches-en-Ouche, Eure, Normandie, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Raoul Ralph de Tosny III 1080 in Conches, Normandie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Raoul III de Tosny seigneur de Conches-en-Ouche 53 und seine Mutter Isabel de Monfort 24. Er hatte mit Adelise of Huntingdon mindestens 4 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb 1126 im Alter von 46 Jahren in Conches, Seine-et-Marne, Île-de-France, Frankreich und wurde in Conches-en-Ouche, Eure, Normandie, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Raoul Ralph de Tosny III è nato il nel 1080 nel Conches, Normandie, Francia, il suo padre, Raoul III de Tosny seigneur de Conches-en-Ouche, aveva 53 anni e il suo madre, Isabel de Monfort, aveva 24 anni. Lui avuto almeno 4 figli e 4 figlie con Adelise of Huntingdon. Morì nel 1126, nel Conches, Seine-et-Marne, Île-de-France, Francia, all'età di 46 anni, e fu sepolto a Conches-en-Ouche, Eure, Normandie, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Raoul Ralph de Tosny IIIが1080年にフランスノーマンディコンチェスで生まれた時，父Raoul III de Tosny seigneur de Conches-en-Oucheは53歳，母Isabel de Monfortは24歳であった。彼はAdelise of Huntingdonとの間に少なくとも4人の息子と4人の娘をもうけた。彼は1126年にフランスiレ-デ-フランスセアイネ-エト-マルンコンチェスで46歳で死去し，フランスノーマンディエウアコンチェス-エン-オウチェにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Raoul Ralph de Tosny III(이)가 1080년 프랑스 노먼디 콘체스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Raoul III de Tosny seigneur de Conches-en-Ouche(은)는 53세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabel de Monfort(은)는 24세였다. 그는 Adelise of Huntingdon(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1126년 프랑스 i레-데-프랜스 세이인-트-마니 콘체스에서 46세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 노먼디 우르 콘체스--우체에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Raoul Ralph de Tosny III nasceu em 1080, em Conches, Normandie, França, seu pai, Raoul III de Tosny seigneur de Conches-en-Ouche, tinha 53 anos e sua mãe, Isabel de Monfort, tinha 24 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 4 filhos e 4 filhas com Adelise of Huntingdon. Ele faleceu em 1126, em Conches, Seine-et-Marne, Île-de-France, França, com 46 anos, e foi sepultado em Conches-en-Ouche, Eure, Normandie, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Raoul Ralph de Tosny III родился в 1080 г. в местности кончесь, норманди, Франция, его отцу по имени Raoul III de Tosny seigneur de Conches-en-Ouche было 53 года, а матери, которую звали Isabel de Monfort, 24. У него было по крайней мере 4 сына и 4 дочери от Adelise of Huntingdon. Он умер в 1126 г. в местности кончесь, сине-ет-марн, iле-де-фрэнс, Франция в возрасте 46 лет и был похоронен в местности кончес-ен-оуч, эур, норманди, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Raoul Ralph de Tosny III nació en 1080, en Conches, Normandie, Francia, su papá, Raoul III de Tosny seigneur de Conches-en-Ouche, tenía 53 años y su mamá, Isabel de Monfort, tenía 24 años. Tuvo por lo menos 4 hijos y 4 hijas con Adelise of Huntingdon. Murió en 1126, en Conches, Seine-et-Marne, Île-de-France, Francia, a la edad de 46 años, y fue sepultado en Conches-en-Ouche, Eure, Normandie, Francia.
